testcase.name: test_ceo_login_success

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'CEO' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcf8a80abf80>('role') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcf8a80abf80> = {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..m8ngvmrVMyy8jWadyIDL8iCrCI2zUrC1PUuvBuTfqqg', 'next': {'route': '/venue/home', 'type': 'route'}, 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'created_at': '2026-03-19T07:54:53.089010Z', 'email': 'garcia.rapha2@gmail.com', 'id': '8f562eb7-6bdc-4ab0-b450-6cbb4d984e11', 'name': 'Raphael Garcia', ...}}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration58_ceo_dashboard.py:54: in test_ceo_login_success assert data.get("role") == "CEO" E AssertionError: assert None == 'CEO' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcf8a80abf80>('role') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcf8a80abf80> = {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..m8ngvmrVMyy8jWadyIDL8iCrCI2zUrC1PUuvBuTfqqg', 'next': {'route': '/venue/home', 'type': 'route'}, 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'created_at': '2026-03-19T07:54:53.089010Z', 'email': 'garcia.rapha2@gmail.com', 'id': '8f562eb7-6bdc-4ab0-b450-6cbb4d984e11', 'name': 'Raphael Garcia', ...}}.get
